name: Carolina Dream Frosting- Dkp
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in the top of a double boiler.
2. Beat at low speed on an electric mixer for 30 seconds or until blended.
3. Bring water to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture is slightly thickened (about 20 minutes).
4. Remove from heat; add bourbon and beat at low speed for 1 minute.
5. Combine remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the fruit-nut mixture and mix well.
7. Cool completely.
